name: Linzer Torte#4
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the softened butter with sugar, vanilla, and egg.
2. Gradually add flour a little at a time.
3. Add the grated pecans (chopped in a food processor if desired).
4. Form the dough into 2 balls and refrigerate for about 15 minutes.
5. Roll out one ball of dough on a floured board to form a crust that is 1/2 to 1/4 inch thick. If needed, refrigerate longer.
6. Place the rolled dough in a 12-inch round flan pan with a removable bottom.
7. Spread raspberry preserves over the crust.
8. Roll out the remaining dough and place it on top of the preserves to form a lattice pattern, cutting into strips (use 3 or 4 strips going north to south and east to west).
9. Bake at 325°F for 60 minutes.
10. When slightly cool, carefully remove the bottom from the pan.
11. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
